function.name: length_converter
function.description: Convert a length value from one unit to another

value.description: The actual value to be converted

from_unit.description: the unit from which the value has to be converted

to_unit.description: the unit into which the value has to be converted to

function.long_description: Converts a length value from the specified source unit to the target unit using predefined conversion factors. Supported units include meters (m), kilometers (km), miles (mi), feet (ft), and inches (in).
example_user_queries: How many centimeters are in 5.5 meters?
Convert value 18 from_unit feet to to_unit meters.
